mapper.sql: wqj.id, wqj.bean_name, wqj.cron_expression, wqj.is_pause, wqj.job_name, wqj.method_name, wqj.params, wqj.remark, wqj.create_time, wqj.create_by, wqj.update_time, wqj.update_by

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.bean_name as ${tAlias}_bean_name, ${tAlias}.cron_expression as ${tAlias}_cron_expression, ${tAlias}.is_pause as ${tAlias}_is_pause, ${tAlias}.job_name as ${tAlias}_job_name, ${tAlias}.method_name as ${tAlias}_method_name, ${tAlias}.params as ${tAlias}_params, ${tAlias}.remark as ${tAlias}_remark, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into wta_quartz_job (bean_name, cron_expression, is_pause, job_name, method_name, params, remark, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{beanName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cronExpression,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pause,jdbcType=BIT}, #{jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{methodName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{params,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update wta_quartz_job set bean_name = #{beanName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cron_expression = #{cronExpression,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_pause = #{pause,jdbcType=BIT}, job_name = #{jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, method_name = #{methodName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, params = #{params,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: where wqj.is_pause = 0 order by wqj.id asc
where wqj.is_pause = 1 order by wqj.id asc
